states.description: App drawer showing all installed apps
Allow notifications dialog when first opening app
Tooltip pointing to profile icon for Settings
visual_cues: blue tooltip 'Now you can find Settings and Help & feedback here'

states.description: Dialog to create a new label
Highlights tab showing Favorites and Recents
visual_cues: Recents section with 'Viewed recently' / 'Added recently' toggle
Display section (Sort by, Name format, Theme)
Edit contacts section (Phonetic name, Default account for new contacts)

states.description: Radio/list dialog for a setting (Theme/Sort by/Name format/Phonetic/Default account)
Dialog to add a number to block list
Overflow menu in Help with Version info / Licenses
System file picker (for Import from file)

visual_cues: 'No contacts on your SIM card' if empty

states.description: Phone (dialer) app - alternative path for blocked numbers

visual_cues: 'Your changes have not been saved' Discard / Save

transitions.action: click(Automatically sync app data toggle when ON)

strategies.name: CREATE_CONTACT_BASIC
steps: Open app drawer via swipe up
Dismiss notification permission dialog if shown
click(First name) and type first name
click(Last name) and type last name
If phone/email field hidden: system_back to dismiss keyboard or swipe up to scroll
If needed, click(label) and select desired label from label_dropdown
strategies.success_signal: Navigates to contact_details with name, fields visible, toast '<name> saved'
strategies.fallback: If Save shows 'Add info to save as a contact' error, dismiss and ensure at least name field is non-empty

strategies.name: ADD_CONTACT_WITH_PHOTO
steps: click(Add picture) at top of form
strategies.success_signal: Captured image appears as avatar on contact_details
strategies.fallback: If photo not attached, re-tap Add picture and retry

strategies.name: APPLY_FILTER_CHIP
steps: Locate filter chip row under search bar
click(desired chip e.g. Phone contacts/Email contacts/Company)
strategies.success_signal: Chip becomes highlighted blue with 'x', list filters or shows 'No results'
strategies.fallback: If chip is cut off, swipe horizontally or tap the partially visible chip

strategies.name: SEARCH_CONTACT
strategies.fallback: If not found, optionally create new entry via fab_plus

strategies.name: CHANGE_APP_SETTING
steps: click(Fix & manage) tab OR click(profile_icon) then click(Contacts app settings)
click(target setting e.g. Theme/Sort by/Name format/Phonetic name/Default account)
strategies.success_signal: Sub-label under setting updates to chosen value
strategies.fallback: Return to settings list and re-tap if not changed

strategies.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
steps: Optionally toggle Unknown for unidentified callers
strategies.success_signal: Number appears in blocked list with 'x' for removal
strategies.fallback: If Block button greyed, the field was not focused; tap the input and retype

strategies.name: IMPORT_FROM_FILE
steps: Use hamburger to switch to Downloads
strategies.success_signal: File picker shows target folder contents

strategies.name: EXPORT_TO_VCF
steps: Confirm with SAVE in file picker

strategies.name: CREATE_LABEL
strategies.success_signal: New label appears as header with 'No contacts with this label'

strategies.name: VIEW_VERSION_INFO
strategies.success_signal: Dialog displays app name and version number

strategies.name: TOGGLE_AUTOSYNC
strategies.success_signal: Toggle changes state; sub-text reflects new state

strategies.name: COUNT_VIA_FILTER_OR_TAB
steps: Navigate to relevant view (filter chip, Highlights tab Favorites or Added recently, Blocked numbers)
strategies.success_signal: List items can be counted or 'No results'/'No contacts' = 0

dead_ends.failed_action: swipe_up imprecise -> long-press triggers Wallpaper & Widgets menu
dead_ends.note: Press Home/Back to dismiss, then retry swipe up from clearly empty area

dead_ends.failed_action: Tapping near top of form hits 'Add picture' button instead of First name field
dead_ends.note: Aim lower on First name text box; cancel Add photo dialog if it opens

dead_ends.failed_action: type() executed without explicit field focus -> text not entered into intended field (e.g. duplicate 'JamesJames' or empty input)
dead_ends.note: Always click input field first; verify focus (blue border) before type; use long_press to select existing text for replacement

dead_ends.failed_action: type() before focusing the Phone number field leaves it empty and Block button disabled
dead_ends.note: Click the Phone number input first to give focus, then type

dead_ends.failed_action: Looking for 'Highlights' or call-blocking settings in the Phone app
dead_ends.note: Highlights tab is in Google Contacts app; system-level call blocking may live in Phone app settings

dead_ends.failed_action: Searching for 'Blocked numbers' inside Contacts Settings menu
dead_ends.note: Blocked numbers is in Fix & manage > Other tools, not inside Settings

dead_ends.failed_action: Searching for a contact that doesn't exist returns 'No results' and cannot add from this view
dead_ends.note: Back out and use fab_plus on contacts_main to create

dead_ends.failed_action: Saving with no fields filled triggers 'Add info to save as a contact' error
dead_ends.note: Ensure at least one identifying field is populated before Save

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: App launched and on its main list/empty state with an add affordance available
abstract_steps: Trigger the add-new-entry control (typically a floating action button)
Focus each required input field explicitly before typing
Type each piece of data into the corresponding field
If a field's label/category is configurable, open its selector and choose the requested option
Optionally attach media (capture or pick) via the dedicated picker dialog
Dismiss the on-screen keyboard if it hides remaining fields (system back) or scroll the form
Submit/save using the primary action (often top-right)
failure_modes: Tapping near the avatar/header accidentally opens the photo picker
Typing without focusing a field causes data loss or duplication
Premature save with empty required fields triggers validation error
Auto-suggested text or pre-existing text concatenates with typed text
verification_checklist: Post-save detail view shows all entered values
Confirmation toast/snackbar appears with entity name

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY
abstract_steps: Activate edit mode (e.g., pencil icon)
Focus field needing change
Clear existing content via long-press select or backspace
Type corrected value
Save changes
failure_modes: Replacing text without selecting first causes append instead of overwrite
Dismissing without saving loses edits

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target entry is locatable via list or search
abstract_steps: Search/scroll to the entry
Open overflow or long-press for delete option
Confirm deletion in dialog
failure_modes: Entry not found -> nothing to delete (may already be absent)
Confirmation dialog dismissed accidentally
verification_checklist: Entry no longer appears in list or search

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: App opened to a state where the requested datum is reachable
abstract_steps: Navigate to the section containing the information (tab, settings, help, detail view)
Apply any required filter or selector to narrow the view
Read the value, count, or status from the rendered UI
Return the answer in the requested format
failure_modes: Misreading empty-state as a value other than zero
Filter not applied, leading to wrong count
Information located in a different app than expected
verification_checklist: Source screen clearly shows the answered value

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
categories.precondition: Starting at home or app's root
abstract_steps: Open the app drawer if app shortcut not on home
Launch target app
Dismiss permission prompts and onboarding tooltips
Traverse tabs/menus toward the target screen
Confirm target screen is visible
failure_modes: Swipe gesture interpreted as long-press, opening home customization menu
Launching a similarly-named but wrong app (e.g. dialer vs. contacts manager)
Tooltip overlays obscuring desired control

categories.name: CHANGE_SETTING
categories.precondition: On the app's settings or system settings screen reachable from the app
abstract_steps: Locate the setting row (scroll if necessary)
Tap the row to open chooser dialog or toggle directly
Select desired option / flip toggle
Confirm any follow-up dialog
failure_modes: Setting not present where expected (looking in wrong submenu)
Dialog dismissed without selecting, leaving setting unchanged
Confusing 'system' vs 'app' setting locations
verification_checklist: Sub-label or toggle state reflects new value
Returning to setting later still shows the value

categories.name: FILTER_OR_SEARCH
categories.precondition: Listing view with search bar and/or filter chips
abstract_steps: Tap filter chip or open search input
Provide query or selection
Submit if needed (keyboard enter)
Read filtered results
failure_modes: Chip is off-screen; needs horizontal swipe
Search not executed because submit not pressed
No results misinterpreted
verification_checklist: Chip is highlighted/active or query shown in search bar

categories.name: BLOCK_OR_RESTRICT_ITEM
categories.precondition: On a management screen exposing a block/restriction list
abstract_steps: Open the add-restriction control
Focus the identifier input field explicitly
Type the identifier
Confirm via primary action button (only enabled when input populated)
failure_modes: Typing without focus leaves field empty and confirm disabled
Toggling unrelated switches by mistake

categories.name: IMPORT_OR_EXPORT_DATA
categories.precondition: On management/tools screen offering import/export actions
abstract_steps: Select the desired import/export action
Use the file picker drawer to choose source/destination folder
Confirm save or select file
failure_modes: Source has no data to import (empty SIM/file)
File picker defaults to wrong location
verification_checklist: Confirmation toast or new file presence
Or clear message indicating empty source

categories.name: MARK_FAVORITE_OR_FLAG
categories.precondition: Entry detail view open with star/flag affordance
abstract_steps: Tap the star/flag icon
Verify icon state changed
failure_modes: Tapping wrong icon (overflow vs star)
Icon state ambiguous; repeated taps may un-favorite
